content.thinking:
The question asks if "corporal" is a commissioned officer rank (not an enlisted or non-commissioned officer rank).

A corporal is a non-commissioned officer (NCO) rank, not a commissioned officer rank. Commissioned officers include ranks like Lieutenant, Captain, Major, etc. Corporals are enlisted personnel who have been promoted to a leadership position but are not commissioned officers.

So the answer is "no".
